=80=99 worth of data.</p></blockquote><p style=3D"margin: 16px 0;">And endi=

 for official data have climbed so far that Simon Trim, an adviser to the s=

ilar, because everyone draws either their odds or the underlying data from =

align the odds they supply with everyone else=E2=80=99s, so as to erase eve=
n the slightest risk of bettors arbitraging variations in prices. =E2=80=9C=
Ten or 15 years ago, there wasn=E2=80=99t this high cost of official data r=
ights,=E2=80=9D he says. =E2=80=9CThere wasn=E2=80=99t the cost of technolo=
gy.=E2=80=9D As various bookmakers=E2=80=99 odds have converged, margins ha=
